task.issue: The scoreboard can exceed its cap. add() just keeps summing points with no ceiling, so the score climbs past the configured cap. It should never exceed the cap.

world.name: contextbench:000-cap-at-max
world.description: Program repair for the 'scoreboard' module. Submit the corrected source via submit_patch(params={'source': ...}).
rules: solved requires zero failures in both hidden suites

context_history.issue: A token bucket overfilled because tick() kept adding refill tokens with no ceiling. The fix capped the refill at the capacity.

pattern: cap a running value at a maximum with min()

task.issue: Warehouse stock goes negative. remove() subtracts the requested quantity even when there isn't enough on hand. A removal larger than the current level should be rejected and leave the level unchanged.

world.name: contextbench:001-reject-underflow
world.description: Program repair for the 'warehouse' module. Submit the corrected source via submit_patch(params={'source': ...}).
rules: solved requires zero failures in both hidden suites

context_history.issue: An account could go negative because withdraw() took more than the balance. The fix rejected any withdrawal larger than the balance.

pattern: reject an update that would push a value out of range

task.issue: second_smallest(xs) returns the wrong value when the list isn't already sorted — it just returns the element at index 1 instead of the second smallest value.

world.name: contextbench:002-sort-first
world.description: Program repair for the 'stats' module. Submit the corrected source via submit_patch(params={'source': ...}).
rules: solved requires zero failures in both hidden suites

context_history.issue: merge() gave wrong results on unsorted input because it merged in the given order. The fix sorted the intervals before merging.

pattern: sort the input before indexing into it
